title: Better a Widow
writer: Ennio De Concini, Adriano Baracco, Brian Degas
actors: Virna Lisi, Peter McEnery, Gabriele Ferzetti
plot: In this delightful romantic comedy, Peter McEnery plays Tom Proby, a representative from a British engineering firm. He is sent to Sicily to convince the landowners (all in the Mafia) to allow his company to build an oil refinery ...
